headline: NextEra Dominion Deal Reshapes Regulated Utilities And Clean Energy Scale
summary: NextEra Energy (NYSE:NEE) announced a proposed all stock acquisition of Dominion Energy valued at US$66.8b. The combined company is expected to become the world's largest regulated electric utility and a global leader in clean energy and battery storage. The transaction, if completed, would mark one of the biggest utility sector deals to date and could reshape the US power sector. NextEra Energy, known for its regulated utilities and large-scale renewables portfolio, is already a key player...
